Free QR Codes That Never Expire

Many 'free' QR generators give you a dynamic code on a 14-day trial — when the trial ends, your printed code goes dead. Ours are static: the content lives inside the image, so the code works forever.

Your WiFi details never leave this page — the code is generated entirely in your browser.

Customize

Start typing — your QR code updates live.

Free forever · static codes never expire

How it works

  1. 1

    Choose what to encode: a URL, plain text, WiFi credentials, or a vCard contact card.

  2. 2

    Customize with a logo and colors if you like — all free, no watermark.

  3. 3

    Download PNG or SVG. Done. There is no account, so there is nothing that can expire or be shut off.

⚠️ The trial trap: generators like QR Code Generator Pro and Beaconstac issue dynamic codes that route through their servers. Stop paying, and every code you printed stops working.
♾️ Static codes are trap-free: the URL or text is encoded directly into the pixels. Once downloaded, no company — including us — can turn it off.
🆓 Actually free means no sign-up, no watermark, no scan limits, no resolution paywall, and no expiration. That is our free tier, permanently.
📊 When you DO want dynamic: if you need to change the destination after printing or count scans, that genuinely requires a server — that is our Premium tier, priced honestly.

Frequently asked questions

What is the difference between static and dynamic QR codes?

A static code encodes your content directly in the image and works forever without any server. A dynamic code encodes a short redirect URL owned by the provider, which lets you edit the destination and track scans — but the code dies if the provider or your subscription lapses.

Why do QR codes from other "free" generators stop working?

Because they silently give you a dynamic code tied to a trial account. When the trial ends, the redirect server rejects the scan. Your printed materials are then worthless unless you pay.

Is there a scan limit on free codes?

No. Static codes do not touch our servers at all, so there is nothing to limit. A million scans cost us nothing and cost you nothing.

Do I need an account to download my QR code?

No. No account, no email, no cookie wall. Generate and download — the entire tool runs in your browser.

How do you make money if the generator is free?

Premium dynamic codes. If you need editable destinations or scan analytics, those features require real infrastructure, and that is what we charge for. Static codes stay free forever.

Need Dynamic QR Codes? Go Premium

Free static QR codes never expire. Premium adds dynamic codes: change the destination URL without reprinting, and track scans with analytics.
